docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY TAM, MAN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2018 BY JPT: DAVID LAVINE; APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED; NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, MAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KINANN, ROBERT $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT SHE IS ENTITLED TO RETURN OF HER COMMERCIAL SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: 0) SERVED APR-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KINANN, ROBERT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY TAM, MAN AS TO DEFENDANT KINANN, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
